name: Kodama Chemical Industry Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kodama Chemical Industry Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells plastic products in Japan and internationally. The company offers automobile interior and exterior parts, such as pillars and trims, trunk rooms, doors, bumpers, package trays to automobile manufacturers, as well as DVD and Blu-ray cases. It also provides resin products used around water, such as vanity mirrors, kitchens, toilets, and baths, as well as Celeblight, a mirror. The company was formerly known as Kodama Metal Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kodama Chemical Industry Co.,Ltd. in 1955. Kodama Chemical Industry Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
